programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf tour heads to Club de Golf Chapultepec in Mexico City, Mexico. Catch all the action right here, live and free on 7 & 7plus.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights as the Supercars return to Taupo International Motorsport Park for the first round of The NZ Double Header.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the worst winter in decades rages across the nation, the Mountain Men must fight to stay on top of the food chain.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave brings his mentor with him to Rancho Cucamonga, California, but has little to show for it. Brandi and Jarrod go all in on a hunch. Ivy shows a sceptical Emily how he pulls a win out of a locker.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With slim pickings in southern Florida, Mike and Frank finally stumble on a hurricane-ravaged barn. The guys scour a millionaire's awesome collection where they spring for a mysterious car part.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The team fasten their seat belts when a 2003 Lamborghini Murcielago speeds into the shop. Originally purchased for $400,000, will Corey keep the negotiation on track?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A guy comes in with a genuine Olympic torch, which was carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games.

programme.title: Kick Ons
programme.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports Series
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top lumberjack sports athletes as they compete with axes and saws.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty makes a new start in some of Alaska's most unforgiving terrain, but his first solo flight into the Revelation Mountains becomes a dangerous ordeal. Kyle helps his son Ben break his first colt.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: It's time for some soon-to-be stepbrothers' bonding when Tyler and Brettly volunteer to tow in a 1947 railroad speeder. Later, a client brings in a NYC police call box.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Nine stories of treasures in the Koreatown neighbourhood of Los Angeles. The Vegas Ladies discover that one of them has Texas flair. Mary gets the spring back in her step.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike and Frank get VIP access to an authentic retro sideshow where they meet the Wolf Boy and a world champion sword swallower. Later, the guys get junk drunk at a former pawnshop owner's jam-packed property. At a Tampa museum, the guys get some great news about a carnie artefact.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The end is near for the team when they check out an alleged original print by Renaissance artist Albrecht Durer, known for his depictions of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chumlee nearly loses his grip when a pair of Marty McFly high tops levitates into the shop. A limited edition Nike shoe, will Chumlee tie up the deal, or will he send these kicks back to the future?

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: In this week's episode, teenagers get stuck in a lift they're defacing with graffiti, a fiery crash makes heroes out of bystanders and a late-night robbery doesn't go to plan.

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: A car enters a tunnel on fire, someone threatens Sydney Trains with a bomb, a man tries to buy a drink after the bar has closed and a toddler stepping on to a train disappears onto the tracks.

programme.title: Ticket To Paradise
programme.desc: A divorced couple teams up and travels to Bali to stop their daughter from making the same mistake they think they made 25 years ago.

programme.title: Scent of a Woman
programme.desc: A blind ex-soldier pays a timid student to accompany him on a wild weekend trip, but the job is not at all what he anticipated.

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: In this week's episode, teenagers get stuck in a lift they're defacing with graffiti, a fiery crash makes heroes out of bystanders and a late-night robbery doesn't go to plan.

programme.title: Surveillance Oz
programme.desc: A car enters a tunnel on fire, someone threatens Sydney Trains with a bomb, a man tries to buy a drink after the bar has closed and a toddler stepping on to a train disappears onto the tracks.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The end is near for the team when they check out an alleged original print by Renaissance artist Albrecht Durer, known for his depictions of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chumlee nearly loses his grip when a pair of Marty McFly high tops levitates into the shop. A limited edition Nike shoe, will Chumlee tie up the deal, or will he send these kicks back to the future?

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf tour heads to Club de Golf Chapultepec in Mexico City, Mexico. Catch all the action right here, live and free on 7 & 7plus.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike and Frank get VIP access to an authentic retro sideshow where they meet the Wolf Boy and a world champion sword swallower. Later, the guys get junk drunk at a former pawnshop owner's jam-packed property. At a Tampa museum, the guys get some great news about a carnie artefact.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The end is near for the team when they check out an alleged original print by Renaissance artist Albrecht Durer, known for his depictions of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Cathedral Classic
programme.desc: The Cathedral Classic, presented by AIA, is hosted at the exclusive Cathedral Golf Club & Lodge. Australian superstars of sport & screen take on the course, raising funds for the Adam Scott Foundation.

programme.title: The 4WD Adventure Show
programme.desc: Remote travel really is the only way to uncover Australia's hidden secrets!

programme.title: Life off Road
programme.desc: Celebrates all aspects of four-wheel driving and off-roading.

programme.title: The Car Club
programme.desc: Bruce, Mark and Amelia meet car enthusiasts sharing their passion of cars from old to new, and everything in between.

programme.title: STIHL Timbersports Series
programme.desc: Follow Australia's top lumberjack sports athletes as they compete with axes and saws.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 make their way to Dollywood, stop in to do a lap of Bristol Speedway, and check out Thunder Valley. Just another typical day in the South with guns, barbecue and moonshine.

programme.title: My Road to Adventure
programme.desc: Cam Sinclair, one of Australia's all-time freestyle motocross greats, returns to Phillip Island, Victoria with family and friends to revisit his roots travelling in his Jayco Basestation, Pt. 1.

programme.title: Rides Down Under: Aussie Truckers
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes to get a real-life insight into the trials and tribulations of one of Australia's premier independent trucking companies.

programme.title: Night Thunder
programme.desc: Night Thunder's high-speed thrills and intense racing action from Perth Motorplex, live and free, streaming on 7plus.

programme.title: Frozen Gold
programme.desc: Ray must build a crucial piece of mining equipment. Erik and Christian head to a neighbouring claim where the promise of bigger gold is hard to resist.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin is won over by a hotrod pick-up truck, Danny tracks down a customer's original 1969 Firebird but its terrible condition may make it impossible to restore.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Emotions run deep when Danny receives an astronomical offer for one of his prized cars. Kevin helps spot an epic flip that brings in a ton of cash.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick and the gang geek out when some cool items from the space program land in the store: a signed autographed US flag from Apollo 16, a space shuttle toilet seat, and a signed Apollo program book.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for his grades. Kenny faces obstacles furnishing his new house, while Lisa learns some important lessons.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Agent J is sent to find Agent K and restore his memory after the re-appearance of a case from K's past.

programme.title: xXx
programme.desc: Xander Cage, an extreme sports athlete, is hired by the US Government to gather information on an organisation that may just be planning the destruction of the world.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick and the gang geek out when some cool items from the space program land in the store: a signed autographed US flag from Apollo 16, a space shuttle toilet seat, and a signed Apollo program book.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for his grades. Kenny faces obstacles furnishing his new house, while Lisa learns some important lessons.

programme.title: Frozen Gold
programme.desc: Ray must build a crucial piece of mining equipment. Erik and Christian head to a neighbouring claim where the promise of bigger gold is hard to resist.

programme.title: Outback Outlaw Comedian
programme.desc: Pauly and his touring crew find themselves performing to a rowdy crowd in far north Queensland. Pauly makes friends with the wild locals and explores their bogan world.

programme.title: Outback Outlaw Comedian
programme.desc: Pauly and his crew run amok in the desert town of Coober Pedy, South Australia. The dancers go missing before the start of the show and Pauly must head to a local rodeo in search of them.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf tour heads to Club de Golf Chapultepec in Mexico City, Mexico. Catch all the action right here, live and free on 7 & 7plus.
